service_calls.note: Used to build warningTypeId → translation key dictionary for response DTOs
toDateUtc is extended +1 day in controller

sql_operations.operation: select * from Warnings where ProfileId = @profileId and DateCreatedUtc >= @fromDateUtc and DateCreatedUtc < @toDateUtc

validations: No explicit date range validation — toDateUtc.AddDays(1) is applied silently in controller (KamstrupReportsController.cs:90)

fields: WarningType: string (translation key from warningTypes dictionary)

auth.note: Controller is SuperAdmin-only — no per-profile authorization check in GetWarnings (only profile existence check)

notes: Controller route: [Authorize(SuperAdmin)] → only super admins can list warnings by profile. The response maps WarningTypeId → NameTranslationKey (string) and Status (int) → translation key string. Fields and Recipients are NOT returned in this endpoint — raw Warning entity only. WarningService.GetWarningsByProfile delegates directly to repository — no business logic layer.
